positive: A symmetrical, stylized depiction of celestial fauna elements interwoven with geometric mandalas. The central subject is a majestic, stylized owl silhouette perched within a swirling nebula pattern, flanked by stylized moons, constellations, and abstract floral motifs. The artwork should utilize high contrast black ink on a creamy background, featuring vibrant, deep indigo, shimmering gold foil accents, and ethereal teal highlights. The composition must be centered, clean, and suitable for single-color screen printing on apparel. Incorporate fine dot work, intricate linework, and sharp, graphic edges. Hyperdetailed, vector art quality, symmetry, clean lines, maximalist design.
